channel.title: at - Automatisierungstechnik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in at - Automatisierungstechnik

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Malte Nagel, Max Brower-Rabinowitsch, Dennis Schmiele, Lennart Hinz, Richard Krimm, Bernd-Arno Behrens, Eduard Reithmeier DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2025-frontmatter3

item.title: Data-driven process modeling in metal forming
item.description: Article by Malte Nagel, Max Brower-Rabinowitsch, Dennis Schmiele, Lennart Hinz, Richard Krimm, Bernd-Arno Behrens, Eduard Reithmeier DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2025-0005

item.title: Advancing data-driven process modeling in metal forming
item.description: Article by Malte Nagel, Max Brower-Rabinowitsch, Dennis Schmiele, Lennart Hinz, Richard Krimm, Bernd-Arno Behrens, Eduard Reithmeier DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2024-0118

item.title: Development of a digital twin for data-driven modeling of punch-bending processes using a graphical modeling notation
item.description: Article by Malte Nagel, Max Brower-Rabinowitsch, Dennis Schmiele, Lennart Hinz, Richard Krimm, Bernd-Arno Behrens, Eduard Reithmeier DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2024-0112

item.title: Experimental study on automation and data-driven modeling in the punching-collar forming process
item.description: Article by Malte Nagel, Max Brower-Rabinowitsch, Dennis Schmiele, Lennart Hinz, Richard Krimm, Bernd-Arno Behrens, Eduard Reithmeier DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2024-0104

item.title: Training robust neural networks for uncertainty prediction in stamping technology
item.description: Article by Malte Nagel, Max Brower-Rabinowitsch, Dennis Schmiele, Lennart Hinz, Richard Krimm, Bernd-Arno Behrens, Eduard Reithmeier DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2024-0132

item.title: Robuste Inline-Rekonstruktion geometrischer Merkmale in der Blechumformung auf Basis von Laserprofilsensoren
item.description: Article by Malte Nagel, Max Brower-Rabinowitsch, Dennis Schmiele, Lennart Hinz, Richard Krimm, Bernd-Arno Behrens, Eduard Reithmeier DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2024-0133
